title: The Big Picture: Panama Canal avoidance
section_path: The Big Picture: Panama Canal avoidance
section_path_text: The Big Picture: Panama Canal avoidance
summary:
The Big Picture: Panama Canal avoidance
Panama Canal avoidance, as opposed to congestion, has been the main consequence of transit restrictions for the dry bulk freight market. Transit numbers on the main laden Atlantic-to-Pacific direction have lagged 2022 substantially. This not only reflects Canal avoidance but also underperformance in US grain exports this year.
